# Happy English Club — Education Manager

> Education management platform for Happy English Club: classes, attendance, payments, homework, leaderboards, and student vocabulary practice.

Happy English Club (HEC) is an English-language school. This site is the staff, teacher, family, and student portal — most pages are gated behind authentication and only accessible to enrolled members.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Sign-in landing for students, families, teachers, and admins.
- [Sign in](/auth): Authentication page for existing accounts.

## Optional

- [New student site](https://user.hanoienglish.vip/): Newer student-facing experience (same credentials).
